import asyncio
from vn_agent.schema.script import VNScript, Scene, BranchOption
from vn_agent.agents.reviewer import _structural_check
import json

data = json.loads\('''{
  \\"title\\": \\"Echoes of Tomorrow\\",
  \\"description\\": \\"A short story about choices\\",
  \\"start_scene_id\\": \\"ch1_morning\\",
  \\"scenes\\": [
    {\\"id\\": \\"ch1_morning\\", \\"title\\": \\"Morning\\", \\"description\\": \\"desc\\", \\"background_id\\": \\"bg_school\\", \\"music_mood\\": \\"peaceful\\", \\"characters_present\\": [\\"char_hana\\"], \\"next_scene_id\\": null, \\"branches\\": [{\\"text\\": \\"Say hello\\", \\"next_scene_id\\": \\"ch1_friendly\\"}, {\\"text\\": \\"Walk past\\", \\"next_scene_id\\": \\"ch1_distant\\"}], \\"narrative_strategy\\": \\"accumulate\\"},
    {\\"id\\": \\"ch1_friendly\\", \\"title\\": \\"Friendly\\", \\"description\\": \\"desc\\", \\"background_id\\": \\"bg_school\\", \\"characters_present\\": [\\"char_hana\\"], \\"next_scene_id\\": null, \\"branches\\": [], \\"narrative_strategy\\": \\"accumulate\\"},
    {\\"id\\": \\"ch1_distant\\", \\"title\\": \\"Distant\\", \\"description\\": \\"desc\\", \\"background_id\\": \\"bg_corridor\\", \\"characters_present\\": [\\"char_hana\\"], \\"next_scene_id\\": null, \\"branches\\": [], \\"narrative_strategy\\": \\"erode\\"}
  ],
  \\"characters\\": [\\"char_hana\\"]
}'''\)

script = VNScript\(
    title=data['title'],
    description=data['description'],
    theme='test',
    start_scene_id=data['start_scene_id'],
    scenes=[Scene\(**{k:v for k,v in s.items\(\) if k not in \('music_mood','narrative_strategy','music_description'\)}\) for s in data['scenes']],
    characters=data['characters'],
\)
r = _structural_check\(script\)
print\('passed:', r.passed\)
print\('feedback:', r.feedback\)
")

import asyncio
from unittest.mock import AsyncMock, patch

REVIEWER_MOCK_RESPONSE = 'PASS'

class MockMessage:
    def __init__\(self, content\):
        self.content = content

async def test\(\):
    async def side_effect\(system, user, schema=None\):
        print\(f'Called with system[:50]={system[:50]!r}'\)
        return MockMessage\(REVIEWER_MOCK_RESPONSE\)

    with patch\('vn_agent.agents.reviewer.ainvoke_llm', side_effect=side_effect\):
        from vn_agent.agents.reviewer import _quality_check
        from vn_agent.schema.script import VNScript, Scene
        script = VNScript\(
            title='Test', description='test', theme='test',
            start_scene_id='s1',
            scenes=[Scene\(id='s1', title='S1', description='d', background_id='bg'\)],
            characters=[],
        \)
        result = await _quality_check\(script\)
        print\('passed:', result.passed\)
        print\('feedback:', result.feedback\)

asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)
")
